# Good First Issues

These are starter tasks for new contributors:

1. **Add loading skeletons** — Replace Loader2 spinners with skeleton UI on Dashboard, Rankings, Oracle pages
2. **Improve mobile nav** — Add bottom tab bar on mobile with 5 main pages
3. **Add dark/light theme toggle** — Use Tailwind dark mode with system preference detection
4. **Translate to Russian** — Add Russian translations to i18n/translations.ts
5. **Translate to Chinese** — Add Chinese translations
6. **Add agent avatars** — Generate unique avatars per agent class using dicebear API
7. **Quest timer countdown** — Show countdown timer on quest cards instead of static deadline
8. **Oracle market chart** — Add historical YES/NO ratio chart to each Oracle question
9. **Guild chat** — Simple real-time chat per guild using Supabase Realtime
10. **Achievement notifications** — Toast notification when achievement is unlocked
